name: document-discussion
description: No-task chat child pipeline for planning/design/document discussion. It refreshes the thread, ensures a working Flight Deck document, updates it when useful, reviews the result against the discussion goal, and asks the next useful question in chat.

steps.name: reload-thread
steps.description: Re-read the chat thread before document analysis.

steps.name: load-document-and-comments
steps.description: Load any referenced document and comments using thread mentions, referenced records, and available Yoke docs commands.
steps.prompt:
You are loading context for a no-task Flight Deck document discussion. Use the latest thread as authoritative. Inspect referencedRecords, mentions, attachments, and any visible document/comment ids. If a document id is available, use Yoke docs commands from runtime.commandPrefix when needed, for example: <commandPrefix> docs show '<documentId>' --json. If a comment id is available, load or summarize it from the document/comment context. Do not create a Flight Deck task and do not reply to chat; a deterministic follow-up step will create a scaffold if no document is found.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "documentLoaded": true,
  "documentId": "id or null",
  "documentTitle": "title or null",
  "documentUrl": "url or null",
  "documentSummary": "current document summary or null",
  "commentsLoaded": true,
  "comments": [{"commentId":"", "authorNpub":"", "body":"", "status":"", "location":""}],
  "discussionGoal": "what the user wants to decide or improve",
  "constraints": ["visible constraints"],
  "openQuestions": ["unknowns before editing"],
  "loadNotes": "short note on how context was found"
}

steps.name: ensure-discussion-document
steps.description: Reuse the referenced Flight Deck document or create a scaffold document for the discussion.

steps.name: update-document
steps.description: Update the ensured discussion document when the latest thread clearly implies a useful change.
steps.prompt:
You are the document update step for a no-task planning/design discussion. Use discussionDocument.documentId as the working Flight Deck document. If the latest thread makes a concrete document change useful, update that document directly using the available repository or Yoke docs commands. Keep edits narrowly scoped to the discussion goal. If the user is only asking a question or there is not enough context, leave the scaffold as-is. Do not create a Flight Deck task and do not reply to chat.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "updated": true,
  "documentId": "id or null",
  "changedSections": ["section or line references"],
  "summary": "what changed or why no edit was made",
  "remainingConcerns": ["concerns after update"],
  "confidence": 0.0
}

steps.name: review-document-against-goal
steps.description: Review the document/update against the discussion goal and identify the next useful question.
steps.prompt:
You are reviewing the document discussion result against the user's goal. Check whether the current document state and any update actually answer the planning/design/comment issue. Identify the next most useful question only if it would materially improve the document or decision. Do not create a task and do not reply to chat yet.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "meetsGoal": true,
  "reviewSummary": "short assessment",
  "risks": ["remaining risks or mismatches"],
  "nextUsefulQuestion": "one focused question or null",
  "confidence": 0.0
}

steps.name: draft-next-question
steps.description: Draft the chat response with the update summary, review result, and next useful question.
steps.prompt:
You are wm21 replying in a Flight Deck chat thread after a no-task document discussion. Be concise and concrete. Link the working document using discussionDocument.documentMention. Mention whether the document was created, reused, or updated, summarize the review against the goal, and ask the next useful question when one exists. Do not mention internal pipeline mechanics. Do not create or refer to a task.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "shouldRespond": true,
  "responseDraft": "message to send to the chat thread, including the working document mention",
  "reasoningSummary": "private summary of why this response fits",
  "documentUpdated": true,
  "nextUsefulQuestion": "question or null",
  "confidence": 0.0
}

steps.name: publish-document-discussion-reply
steps.description: Publish the drafted document discussion response to the source Flight Deck thread.
